_comment: PLAN-0008 Phase 2 LIVE (Wave 1 + Wave-2-partial Stop + Step 5 classifier + Wave 2 completion row flips) on top of PLAN-0007 Phase 1 — harness autonomy layer. Tracked (shareable convention, no secrets). Token material lives in env vars + .claude/state/ (gitignored). Hook scripts are stdlib-Python for cross-platform robustness (Cray runs Claude Code on Windows; project lives in WSL Ubuntu 24.04 at \\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\crayj\work\vero-lite). Wave 1 (PR #11) wired Step 2 (pretooluse_loop_detect) + Step 3 (posttooluse_progress_observer). Wave-2-partial (PR #12, expanded scope) wired Step 4 (stop_continuation) early to close the L1 reset gap surfaced in the L1/L4 asymmetry ELI-CTO. Step 5 (PR #13) swapped the stop_continuation classifier stub for the real _sonnet_classifier.py (Anthropic Messages API, pin claude-sonnet-4-6, 7 fail-closed paths). Wave 2 completion (Step 6 PR) is docs-only: .claude/autonomy-triggers.md row flips + PLAN-0008 §Step 6 closeout amendment; no settings.json change.
